common.tagline: The safe way to find an integration aide for your child
common.offline: No internet connection — some actions are unavailable

legal.privacyBeta: Beta version — full document will be published before public launch.
legal.privacyBody: Besiluv collects technical identifiers (phone, check-in location) and usage data for matching and operations. No data is sold to third parties. Child data is protected by RLS and tiered access.
legal.termsBeta: Beta version — for invited testers only.
legal.termsBody: By using the app you agree to the terms of service to be published. Only verified professionals can receive requests. Parents control child profile publishing and access permissions.

admin.queueEmpty: Queue is empty — all caught up ✓
admin.bioContactWarning: Phone/email patterns detected in bio — verify no contact details

checklist.criminal_record_valid: Background check valid with no relevant record
checklist.bio_no_contact: Bio has no contact details (platform bypass)

admin.approveLocked: Complete all checklist items before approving
admin.rejectSubtitle: Select a document and enter a rejection reason — the professional will see it
admin.rejectSuccess: Document rejected — professional will be notified
admin.webOnlySubtitle: System management is available in the browser only
admin.webOnlyBody: The admin area is browser-only. Open Besiluv Admin via the project web URL (npx expo start --web) and sign in with an admin account.

staff.mineEmpty: Nothing assigned to you right now
staff.notAssigned: This case is not assigned to you. Go back and claim it from the pool.
staff.phoneHidden: Phone is revealed only after viewing all documents and submitting a rejection note.
staff.rejectGateHint: View all required documents before rejecting. Enter what is wrong or missing — then phone is revealed.
staff.webOnlyBody: Sign in via npx expo start --web with a supervisor or admin account.
staff.usersSearch: Search by name, phone, or area
staff.loginCredentialsHint: Set an email and password so the user can sign in with email + password (after MFA via phone or email).
staff.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
staff.mfaBanner: Admin actions require 2FA — tap to set up
staff.mfaEnrollHint: Scan the QR in your authenticator app, then enter the code
staff.mfaVerifyHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app

parent.approveConfirm: Once approved, an active match will be created with the professional.

activeMatch.metricsConfirmedDesc: Your active match has started. You can begin tracking from the dashboard.

permissions.title: Permissions & control
permissions.subtitle: What {{name}} sees in the file
permissions.noDetails: No sensitive details saved in the file
permissions.pauseConfirm: The professional won't access the file until you restore access

parent.intro: Get the most out of Besiluv as a parent

0.title: Welcome
0.body: Manage your child’s profile, match requests and daily support — all in one place.

1.title: Create a child profile
1.body: Add your child’s details, needs and setting. A complete profile brings better matches.

2.title: Choose a professional
2.body: Review matching candidates, read their offers and approve the best fit.

3.title: Daily tracking
3.body: Follow attendance check-ins, daily summaries, and rate the support when it ends.

professional.intro: Start working with Besiluv as a professional

0.title: Welcome
0.body: Manage your professional profile, documents and shifts here.

1.title: Verify your documents
1.body: Upload your ID, police clearance and certification. Verification is required before placements.

2.title: Browse children & requests
2.body: Review matching children in your area and express interest, or respond to parent requests.

3.title: Active shift
3.body: Check in via GPS at the start of a shift, and fill the short daily report at the end.

admin.intro: Manage the system from the staff area

0.title: Dashboard
0.body: Overview of active matches, alerts and system activity.

1.title: User management
1.body: Search, suspend and restore users, and view account details.

2.title: Analytics & settings
2.body: Funnel metrics, reports and system settings. Sensitive actions require MFA.

0.title: Verification queue
0.body: Professionals awaiting verification that are assigned to you appear here.

1.title: Review documents
1.body: Open each document (ID, clearance, certification) and check it.

2.title: Approve or reject
2.body: Approve after reviewing all documents, or reject with a detailed reason.
